nasb.text: And it will be in the day when the Lord gives you rest from your pain and turmoil and harsh service in which you have been enslaved,

esv.text: When the Lord has given you rest from your pain and turmoil and the hard service with which you were made to serve,

cnv.text: 耶和華使你脫離痛苦、愁煩、被迫作的苦工，得享安息的日子，

ccb.text: 耶和华使他们脱离痛苦、悲伤和残酷奴役的时候，

csbs.text: 在耶和华使你脱离痛苦、烦扰，脱离被迫做的苛役，得享安息的日子里，
